hooks.command: staged=$(git diff --cached --name-only); if [ -n "$staged" ]; then REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_FORMATTER $staged >/dev/null 2>&1; echo "$staged" | xargs git add; fi; true
hooks.statusMessage: TEMPLATE: run your project's formatter on staged files before commit (edit REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_FORMATTER in settings.json)
TEMPLATE: run your project's typecheck/compile on the edited file (edit REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_TYPECHECK in settings.json)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_TEST_COMMAND' && echo '{"systemMessage":"Test suite finished."}' || true

branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^STORY-[0-9]+' && printf '{"systemMessage":"Branch %s — remember to run the full test suite before marking the change request ready."}\n' "$branch" || echo '{}'
